original_image_tags: A single off-white page, appearing to be a document back or routing slip, bearing two blue ink stamps. One stamp at the top center reads "MR. JONES" and "RECEIVED FBI U S DEPT OF JUSTICE" with a date of September 8, 1952, at 4:57 PM. A second stamp, positioned vertically along the left margin, reads "REC'D ESPIONAGE FBI U S DEPT OF JUSTICE" with a date of September 15, 1952, at 4:25 PM. Three hole-punch marks are visible at the bottom edge, with the leftmost punch partially torn. Minor foxing and smudges are present on the paper.

elements.description: A document page featuring two blue ink stamps. The upper stamp reads 'MR. JONES SEP 8 4 57 PM '52 RECEIVED FBI U S DEPT OF JUSTICE'. The left-side stamp reads 'SEP 15 4 25 PM '52 REC'D ESPIONAGE FBI U S DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. There are three hole-punch marks at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the two blue stamps, the hole-punch marks, and the general stamp text, but they disagree on the exact wording of the upper stamp's date/time line, where Description A adds '4:57 PM' and 'September 8, 1952' while Description B uses 'SEP 8 4 57 PM '52'.
